content.full_text:
February 1, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, Ca. 95804-0807

Dear Sirs:

I am a candidate for re-election to the city council in the city of Montclair, on April 10th.

Would you please give me your ruling on the following situation. If I should receive a financial contribution for my campaign expenses from a business in Montclair, and at a later date an issue would appear on the agenda at city council which directly, or indirectly, involves said business; would it be necessary for me to abstain from voting on that issue to avoid a conflict of interest?

Your earliest answer to this question would be greatly appreciated.

Sincerely,

Elouise "Dolly" Lewman

EL:pr
